_comment: Video model parameter schemas extracted from AIML API documentation. Used by sync-models.ts to enrich video models with UI parameters.

prompt.description: Text description of the scene, subject, or action to generate

first_frame_image.description: URL or base64 image for first frame (i2v)
URL or base64 image for first frame

tail_image_url.description: URL or base64 image for last frame

image_url.description: URL or base64 image for first frame (i2v)

negative_prompt.description: Elements to avoid in the video

cfg_scale.description: CFG scale (0-1), how closely to follow prompt

audio_url.description: Audio URL to use for video
